extractions.claim: Counterfeit goods complaints accounted for ~59% of Pinduoduo's total Heimao complaints (22,512 out of 38,274) as of March 2025
extractions.evidence: 拼多多假货投诉22,512件，占其平台总投诉量38,274件的约59%

verification.verifier_notes: From Tencent News analysis of Heimao data. Counterfeits remain Pinduoduo's dominant complaint category domestically.

extractions.claim: Pinduoduo's cumulative complaint volume on Heimao exceeded 210,000 cases, making it one of the most-complained-about merchants
extractions.evidence: 拼多多累计投诉量已超过21万件

verification.verifier_notes: Cumulative figure, not annualized. Should be contextualized against transaction volume (billions of orders/year).
